Comment: financial-analytics-orchestrator — Phase 3 dbt-athena build orchestration. Sequence: Glue Python Shell runs dbtRunner build (Risk 24 one process per invocation, Risk 25 exit-code-only success), then Athena .sync runs a complementary raw-SQL verify query against the Silver layer (Risk 29 complementary pattern, NOT a dbt run). Session 13 fans out to all 10 sql/verify/03-12 queries via a Parallel state.
